product.name: ArPower Knit P
product.categorySourceGroup: Ultra elastic medical fabrics for orthopedical,corset and face mask applications.
product.titleDescriptor: Ultra Elsatic Antibacterial Water Repellent Knit Fabric
product.specLine: 350 g/m², 70% Polyester 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Elastic Knit Fabric
descriptions: ArPower Knit P is 70% polyester 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane, 350 g/m² ultra elastic knit fabric for corset applications.
It is antibacterial and resistant up to 20 wash.
ApPower Knit P is water and oil repellent, can be used during orthopedical treatments.
2 layer of this fabric can be easily used to produce certified EN 14683 face masks.
Ultra Elsatic Antibacterial Water Repellent Knit Fabric
350 g/m², 70% Polyester 22% Polyamide 8% Elastane, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Elastic Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 70% Polyester (PES) 22% Polyamide (PU) 8% Elastane (EL) | EN ISO 2076
Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1
